summary: 학생 출결·기록 최근 보기 (attendance/journal record view).
first_command: python -m chat_lms_agent side-panel records open-plan --student <student> --type attendance --profile-root <root> --json
must_not: do not create a new HTML report
do not hand-author data into HTML
do not inspect DB schema before this route
do not use rg before this route
